reviews.comment:
Lo que veo es que si vas al bar se aprovechan de los precios un paquete de yerba (500gr) desde 700 en adelante y eso que es el ACA

(Translated by Google)
What I see is that if you go to the bar they take advantage of the prices for a package of weed (500gr) from 700 onwards and that is the ACA
